title: scrophularia scopolii var. longirostrata
intro: Scrophularia scopolii var. longirostrata, also known as the Long-beaked Figwort, is a plant species within the Scrophulariaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of alkaloids and iridoids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The Long-beaked Figwort is believed to have various health benefits, including the potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Scrophularia scopolii var. longirostrata is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil to harness its medicinal properties.
